_metadata.description: Science faculty (SCI, org 65) program structures from Jac (curriculum.uq.edu.au), compact form: course -> [program codes] + program_names index. Currently-effective Published versions, Semester 1 2026. Extracted Session 12 (2026-06-04), stashed in browser localStorage, landed Session 14 (2026-06-05) with gzip-verified transfer.
_metadata.source: Jac program-rules API via Sean's authenticated session (read-only)
_metadata.form: compact (course->programs reverse map); full role-level detail re-extractable on demand
_metadata.notes: 3 programs use cross-references without embedded course lists (see empty_programs) — same known pattern as GCBusAn/GCTHEM
